description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/showcheap/android-ci:master, with a single stage release and a job named apk. In the before_script export GRADLE_USER_HOME=`pwd`/.gradle, chmod +x ./gradlew, run sdkmanager --update, install platforms;android-28 and build-tools;28.0.3, temporarily disable pipefail, accept all sdkmanager licenses, then re‑enable pipefail. The apk job runs ./gradlew assembleRelease then mv ./app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release-unsigned.apk ./, and runs in the release stage. Cache the .gradle/ directory with a key based on $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME. Publish the generated app-release-unsigned.apk as an artifact named vplayer-$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME, including the path app-release-unsigned.apk.
